description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, angular profile and a predominantly dark gray coloration. Its surface is marked by a mix of rough, jagged edges and flatter planes, with subtle variations in color ranging from deep charcoal to lighter gray and hints of brownish and greenish undertones. The stone displays natural weathering, with some areas appearing slightly smoother and others showing pitted or chipped textures. There are no visible carvings or artificial modifications, and the stone's mass and density suggest it is composed primarily of solid rock. The overall form is asymmetrical, with one side broader and flatter, making it suitable as a natural barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. Its visual presence is substantial, and it would stand out as a solitary feature or blend into a landscaped setting.
description: A rugged, dark gray stone with an irregular, angular shape and weathered surface, featuring subtle color variations and rough textures.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest, flattest face of the stone, with prominent angular edges and a mix of dark and lighter gray tones.
description_view_1: From this angle, the stone appears taller and narrower, highlighting a vertical edge and more pronounced surface pitting.
description_view_2: This side reveals a sloped, uneven surface with visible chips and a blend of gray and brownish hues.
description_view_3: The stone looks more compact and blocky from this perspective, with a slightly smoother area and subtle greenish undertones.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or natural barrier on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and subtle veining with no artificial carvings; natural color variations and surface pitting.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with some smoother patches, indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with landscaped features or contrasts with paved surfaces; may be partially surrounded by grass or soil.
